---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried other approaches? Why didn't they work?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that illustrate what you're looking for.
